description: This shelfmark includes 3 unrelated fragments. Upper left fragment: Legal record in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dated: 1440 Seleucid, which is 1128/29 CE. Inventory of certain objects deposited by Nājiya bt. Abū l-Khayr with the parnas Abū ʿAlī against the promise to bury her in specified clothing. (A previous description on PGP referred to this as a trousseau list.) (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
